title: FedEx India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: FedEx India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at FedEx India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Warehouse Manager to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About FedEx India:
FedEx India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with FedEx India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
